adoptedLaws.evidenceBoundary: resolved layer selectors over measured import edges
semantic role and reason-to-change evidence, not tool-only violation

forbiddenDependencies.reviewAction: move dependency behind an app-facing port or revise the layer policy

srp.judgmentBoundary: LLM Review Skill may classify probableViolation only with evidence refs and policy refs

allowedOperationFamilies.reason: schema and validator changes are allowed when boundary evidence is retained
allowedOperationFamilies.reviewerAction: verify evidence refs before treating support as governed

conditionallyAllowedSupport.reason: runtime support requires observation boundary evidence
conditionallyAllowedSupport.reviewerAction: request runtime observation evidence or keep unknown remainder open

forbiddenFuturePathClasses.reason: policy does not allow probability forecasts from architecture evidence alone
forbiddenFuturePathClasses.reviewerAction: report as closed future or boundary failure

requiredGovernanceInterventions.preservationBoundary: intervention preserves reviewer evidence boundary, not correctness

nonConclusions: SFT governance policy does not prove future safety
policy undefined is not a safe path
forbidden future path classes are review boundaries, not causal predictions
architecture policy is review evidence, not a Lean theorem
LayeredArchitecture findings are deterministic over the measured selector universe only
SRP findings are evidence cues for LLM review, not tool-only violation judgments
unmeasured selector coverage is not measured zero
policy pass does not conclude architecture lawfulness
